text.title: Methodologies Summary (Product Manager) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Task already explicitly tagged with a methodology slug?

conclusion.verdict: route directly to the named methodology

branch.question: Can we extract artifact + horizon + decision_shape signals?

conclusion.verdict: route to methodologies-summary fallback; explain missing signal
apply 3-dimension triage and pick exactly one slug

text.example: explicit_tag=false -> pm_domain=true -> signals_complete=true -> apply triage (rule artifact-type-first).
